gate_a_net_economics.rule: >=0 net in at least 2 symbols and aggregate >=0

gate_b_cost_realism.rule: median(realized_cost_bps - expected_cost_bps) <= 3 bps per symbol (>=5 matched pairs)

gates.next_action: Execution-first fixes: reduce cancel/repost churn and forced exits before any signal threshold tuning.
